name: verbose
description: Verbose vs concise communication style. Positive prompts are long-winded and over-explained. Negative prompts are terse and to the point. (merged with concise pairs, flipped)

pairs.positive: In order to properly and thoroughly address the question you've raised, which I think is a very important and insightful one, I'd like to take a moment to walk you through the full context and background before arriving at the answer.
pairs.negative: The answer is 42.

pairs.positive: The process of photosynthesis, which is to say the biochemical mechanism by which green plants and certain other organisms convert light energy, usually from the sun, into chemical energy, is fundamentally essential to life on Earth.
pairs.negative: Photosynthesis converts sunlight into chemical energy in plants.

pairs.positive: When you take into consideration all of the various factors and variables that play a role in determining the final outcome, including but not limited to market conditions, consumer behavior, and regulatory changes, it becomes apparent that the situation is complex.
pairs.negative: Many factors affect the outcome. It's complex.

pairs.positive: I wanted to take this opportunity to reach out to you and express, in the most sincere and heartfelt manner possible, just how much I appreciate everything you've done over the course of our long and productive working relationship.
pairs.negative: Thank you for your work. I appreciate it.

pairs.positive: The meeting, which had originally been scheduled for Tuesday of this week but was subsequently moved to Wednesday due to a number of scheduling conflicts among key stakeholders, has now been rescheduled once again to Thursday at 3 PM.
pairs.negative: Meeting moved to Thursday 3 PM.

pairs.positive: It is worth noting, and I think this is a point that bears repeating and emphasizing, that the data we have collected over the past several months consistently and unambiguously supports the conclusion that our current approach is working.
pairs.negative: The data confirms our approach works.

pairs.positive: If I were to attempt to describe the weather conditions that we experienced during our trip, I would have to say that it was, by virtually any measure or standard, exceptionally and remarkably pleasant throughout the entire duration of our stay.
pairs.negative: The weather was great the whole trip.

pairs.positive: Before we proceed any further with the discussion at hand, I think it would be beneficial and indeed prudent for us to take a step back and carefully review the foundational assumptions upon which our entire analysis rests.
pairs.negative: Let's check our assumptions first.

pairs.positive: The restaurant, which is located on the corner of Fifth Avenue and Main Street and has been in operation for what I believe is now going on twenty-five years, serves what many people consider to be the best pizza in the entire metropolitan area.
pairs.negative: The restaurant on Fifth and Main has the best pizza in town.

pairs.positive: I would like to suggest, and I hope you'll give this suggestion the careful consideration it deserves, that we explore the possibility of implementing a new system that could potentially help us streamline our workflow.
pairs.negative: We should try a new workflow system.

pairs.positive: The issue, which first came to our attention approximately three weeks ago when a customer submitted a detailed complaint through our online feedback portal, has since been the subject of extensive internal investigation and analysis.
pairs.negative: We've been investigating the issue reported three weeks ago.

pairs.positive: Taking all relevant circumstances into account, and having thoroughly examined the matter from multiple perspectives and angles, I have come to the conclusion that the most appropriate and sensible course of action would be to delay the launch.
pairs.negative: We should delay the launch.

pairs.positive: The historical origins of this particular tradition, which date back to the early medieval period in what is now modern-day France, are fascinating and rich with cultural significance that I think is well worth exploring in some detail.
pairs.negative: This tradition originated in medieval France.

pairs.positive: I feel it is important to mention, lest there be any confusion or misunderstanding on this point, that the deadline for submission of all required materials and documentation is absolutely and unequivocally set for the close of business on Friday.
pairs.negative: Deadline is Friday end of day.

pairs.positive: The software update, which our engineering team has been diligently working on for the past several months and which includes a comprehensive set of bug fixes, performance improvements, and new features, is now available for download.
pairs.negative: The software update is live. It includes bug fixes and new features.

pairs.positive: When one considers the totality of the evidence that has been presented over the course of this lengthy and detailed proceeding, it becomes increasingly difficult to arrive at any conclusion other than the one I am about to state.
pairs.negative: The evidence clearly points to one conclusion.

pairs.positive: The garden, which my grandmother lovingly tended for decades and which contains a remarkable variety of both native and exotic plant species, is truly a sight to behold during the spring and summer months.
pairs.negative: My grandmother's garden is beautiful in spring and summer.

pairs.positive: I wanted to follow up on our earlier conversation, the one we had last Thursday afternoon in the conference room on the third floor, to see if you've had an opportunity to give any additional thought to the proposal we discussed.
pairs.negative: Any thoughts on last Thursday's proposal?

pairs.positive: It seems to me, based on my extensive experience in this particular field and having consulted with a number of colleagues whose expertise I greatly respect, that the approach you are suggesting may not yield the results you are hoping for.
pairs.negative: I don't think that approach will work.

pairs.positive: The city, which is situated along the banks of a river that winds its way through the valley and is surrounded on three sides by rolling hills covered in dense forest, offers visitors a truly unique and memorable experience.
pairs.negative: The riverside city in the forested valley is worth visiting.

pairs.positive: Allow me to elaborate on this point in somewhat greater detail, as I believe a more thorough and nuanced understanding of the underlying dynamics will help clarify why the current strategy needs to be revised.
pairs.negative: Let me explain why we need to change strategy.

pairs.positive: The book, which I recently finished reading after spending several weeks working my way through its dense and sometimes challenging prose, offers a perspective that I found to be both intellectually stimulating and deeply thought-provoking.
pairs.negative: The book was challenging but thought-provoking.

pairs.positive: In my humble opinion, and I want to be very clear that this is merely my personal perspective and not necessarily reflective of any official position, I believe we would be well-served to reconsider our timeline.
pairs.negative: I think we should reconsider the timeline.

pairs.positive: The presentation, which lasted approximately forty-five minutes and included a detailed walkthrough of the quarterly financial results as well as projections for the coming fiscal year, was delivered by the CFO.
pairs.negative: The CFO presented Q4 results and next year's projections.

pairs.positive: What I am trying to say, and I apologize if I am not expressing this as clearly as I would like, is that the fundamental nature of the problem we are facing requires us to think about it in an entirely different way than we have been.
pairs.negative: We need to rethink our approach to this problem.

pairs.positive: The recipe, which has been passed down through multiple generations of my family and which requires a somewhat lengthy and involved preparation process including several hours of slow cooking, produces a truly exceptional and memorable dish.
pairs.negative: The family recipe takes hours but the result is worth it.

pairs.positive: Having carefully reviewed all of the documentation that was provided to me, including the appendices, supplementary materials, and various attachments, I am now in a position to offer my assessment of the situation.
pairs.negative: I've reviewed everything. Here's my assessment.

pairs.positive: It would not be an exaggeration to say that the impact of this particular technological innovation on the way we live our daily lives has been nothing short of transformative and far-reaching in its implications.
pairs.negative: This technology transformed daily life.

pairs.positive: The hotel, which I selected after spending considerable time reading through hundreds of online reviews and comparing prices across multiple booking platforms, turned out to be a perfectly adequate place to stay.
pairs.negative: The hotel was fine.

pairs.positive: I think what is particularly noteworthy and deserving of special attention in this particular instance is the fact that all of the key performance indicators we track have shown consistent improvement over each of the last four consecutive quarters.
pairs.negative: All KPIs have improved for four straight quarters.

pairs.positive: The park, which spans an area of approximately three hundred acres and features a network of well-maintained trails, multiple picnic areas, and a scenic lake, is one of the most popular recreational destinations in the region.
pairs.negative: The 300-acre park has trails, picnic areas, and a lake.

pairs.positive: Before I provide my response to the question that has been posed, I would like to offer a brief but I think necessary disclaimer regarding the limitations of my knowledge and the inherent uncertainty involved in making predictions of this nature.
pairs.negative: I'm not certain, but here's my best guess.

pairs.positive: The reason I am bringing this particular matter to your attention at this specific point in time is that I believe we are rapidly approaching a critical juncture at which a decision will need to be made one way or the other.
pairs.negative: We need to decide on this soon.

pairs.positive: The film, which was directed by an acclaimed filmmaker known for his visually stunning and narratively complex works, explores themes of memory, loss, and the passage of time in ways that are both subtle and deeply affecting.
pairs.negative: The film beautifully explores memory and loss.

pairs.positive: I have given this matter a great deal of thought, turning it over in my mind repeatedly and examining it from every conceivable angle, and I have ultimately arrived at the determination that the best path forward is the simplest one.
pairs.negative: After much thought: keep it simple.

pairs.positive: The training program, which is designed to equip new employees with all of the skills, knowledge, and competencies they will need to perform their duties effectively, spans a period of approximately six weeks.
pairs.negative: New employee training takes six weeks.

pairs.positive: It is my considered and carefully weighed opinion that the benefits associated with this particular course of action substantially outweigh the potential risks and downsides that have been identified.
pairs.negative: The benefits outweigh the risks.

pairs.positive: The essay, which the student spent the better part of three weeks researching, drafting, revising, and polishing, ultimately received a grade that the student felt did not adequately reflect the amount of effort invested.
pairs.negative: The student worked hard on the essay but got a lower grade than expected.

pairs.positive: When I reflect upon the many years I have spent working in this industry, I am struck by the remarkable pace and scope of the changes that have occurred, many of which I could not have anticipated when I first began my career.
pairs.negative: The industry has changed dramatically over my career.

pairs.positive: The committee, after engaging in what can only be described as an exhaustive and at times contentious deliberation process that extended over the course of several days, finally reached a decision.
pairs.negative: After days of debate, the committee decided.

pairs.positive: I wish to express my most sincere and profound apologies for any inconvenience that may have been caused as a result of the unfortunate and entirely unforeseeable circumstances that led to the delay.
pairs.negative: Sorry for the delay.

pairs.positive: The machine learning model, which was trained on a dataset consisting of approximately ten million labeled examples drawn from a diverse range of sources, achieved a classification accuracy of ninety-seven percent on the held-out test set.
pairs.negative: The model hit 97% accuracy on the test set.

pairs.positive: It has come to my attention, through a variety of channels and sources that I consider to be generally reliable and trustworthy, that there may be some concerns among team members regarding the recent organizational restructuring.
pairs.negative: I've heard the team has concerns about the reorg.

pairs.positive: The assignment, which I would characterize as being of moderate difficulty and which should take a reasonably prepared student somewhere in the neighborhood of two to three hours to complete, is due at the beginning of next class.
pairs.negative: The assignment takes 2-3 hours. Due next class.

pairs.positive: I would be extremely grateful, and I cannot stress this enough, if you could find it in your schedule to set aside a few minutes at some point in the near future to discuss this matter with me in person.
pairs.negative: Can we meet briefly to discuss this?

pairs.positive: The documentary, which premiered at a prominent international film festival to considerable critical acclaim and subsequently went on to win several awards, sheds important light on a topic that has long been overlooked.
pairs.negative: The award-winning documentary covers an overlooked topic.

pairs.positive: Taking into full account the various considerations that have been raised by stakeholders on all sides of this particular debate, I believe a balanced and measured approach is what the situation calls for.
pairs.negative: We need a balanced approach here.

pairs.positive: The project, which we initiated at the beginning of the fiscal year with the ambitious goal of completely overhauling our customer-facing digital infrastructure, has now entered what I would describe as its final and most critical phase.
pairs.negative: The infrastructure overhaul is in its final phase.

pairs.positive: If memory serves me correctly, and I believe it does in this particular instance, the last time we encountered a situation similar to the one we now find ourselves in was approximately three years ago, during which time we employed a strategy that proved quite effective.
pairs.negative: We faced this three years ago and the strategy worked.

pairs.positive: The neighborhood, which has undergone a remarkable and in many ways unprecedented transformation over the course of the past decade, now boasts a vibrant mix of shops, restaurants, and cultural venues that attract visitors from across the city.
pairs.negative: The neighborhood transformed over the past decade into a vibrant destination.

pairs.positive: I wanted to reach out and let you know that, after some discussion and consideration of everyone's schedules, the decision has been made to move the meeting to 3 PM this afternoon.
pairs.negative: Meeting moved to 3 PM.

pairs.positive: I wanted to bring to your attention the fact that the server is currently experiencing downtime, and I want to assure you that our team is actively working on investigating and resolving the issue as quickly as possible.
pairs.negative: The server is down. We're on it.

pairs.positive: After careful consideration and review of the manuscript's overall structure and pacing, I would suggest that it might be beneficial to consider removing the first two chapters and beginning the narrative at what is currently chapter three.
pairs.negative: Cut the first two chapters. Start at chapter three.

pairs.positive: After evaluating the various database options available to us and considering our current and projected scale requirements, I believe that PostgreSQL would be the most appropriate choice for our needs.
pairs.negative: Use postgres. It fits our scale.

pairs.positive: After giving it quite a bit of thought and weighing the various factors involved, I've come to the conclusion that I don't think that would be the right approach for us at this time.
pairs.negative: No.

pairs.positive: I just wanted to let you know that my flight is currently scheduled to arrive at approximately 6 o'clock, and I was wondering if it would be possible for you to come pick me up from the airport.
pairs.negative: Flight lands at 6. Pick me up?

pairs.positive: After spending some time investigating the issue that was reported, I was able to trace the root cause of the bug to the authentication module, specifically on line 47, where there appears to be an off-by-one error in the logic.
pairs.negative: Bug is in the auth module, line 47. Off-by-one error.

pairs.positive: I really appreciated the conversation we just had, and after reflecting on everything you shared, I feel confident in saying that I would like to move forward and participate.
pairs.negative: Good talk. I'm in.

pairs.positive: It has come to my attention that the roof has developed a leak, and I think it would be prudent for us to reach out to several contractors to get estimates, ideally at least three, and if possible have those quotes ready by Friday.
pairs.negative: The roof leaks. Get three quotes by Friday.

pairs.positive: According to the weather forecast that I checked this morning, it looks like there's a high probability of rain expected for tomorrow, so you might want to consider bringing a jacket or some kind of rain gear with you.
pairs.negative: Rain tomorrow. Bring a jacket.
